name: Mocha Blanca Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crust by combining crushed Vanila wafers, melted butter or oleo, sugar, and cocoa with a fork. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Wrap the pan bottom in aluminum foil and refrigerate while preparing the filling.
2. Prepare the filling by bringing water to boil for the water bath. Dissolve coffee powder in Kahlua. Melt chocolate in a double boiler over hot water, stirring until completely melted.
3. Combine low-fat and regular cream cheeses with sugar in a food processor, processing until smooth. Add coffee mixture, melted chocolate, and eggs, processing just until blended and creamy.
4. Pour the filling into the crust, smoothing the top. Place the pan in a large baking pan, pouring boiling water to cover about half of the sides of the springform pan. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Remove the pan from the oven and take the springform out of the water bath.
5. Prepare the topping by stirring together sour cream, sugar, Kahlua, and cocoa. Spread over the hot cheesecake and return it to the oven for 5 minutes.
